messages.text: Bold claim for someone off the beach
you say that like id not keep up
Please, you would tap out mid walk
I do more than walk, I race the vibe
That sounded cooler in your head 😳
maybe, but the confidence still hits
Confidence is cute, delusion is funnier
You are committed to this bit
you posted this, im just reading the energy
And what energy are you reading exactly
sunshine trouble with a caffeine addiction
You got one thing right, caffeine stays
not yet, that is why im asking you out
Hm bold again, what are you thinking
drinks this Friday at 8, I pick a spot
